title: Cuneiform Tablet #0587: Middle Babylonian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Babylonian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Middle Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
